primary_text:
Last month, my dog needed a dental clean. Walked in, showed my Best for Pet card, saved $250.

That's on top of four consults that year. $0 each. Vaccinations? Covered. Blood test? Covered.

Six months in, I've saved over $800. For $50 a month.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess, no pre-existing condition traps. A wellness plan at your local vet.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: 4 vet visits. $0 in fees.
description: $50/month covers unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. Cancel anytime.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Split screen: left shows itemised vet receipts fading out, right shows Best for Pet card with $0 balance. Warm lighting, real-feeling.
